'''Kala Kevv''', code-named '''[[Prodigal-One]]''', was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. While flying for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Kevv's [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] crashed on [[NCW-781]]. The resulting [[Operation: Shadowstrike|rescue operation]] retrieved both him and [[Prodigal-Two|his]] [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kala Kevv appears in the [[1996]] [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Instant Adventures]]''.

As an option, the X-wing pilot in "[[Into the Heat of Battle]]" my be made into Kevv.
